message:
feat(gateway): add admin authentication via GATEWAY_ADMIN_KEY

Add simple admin key authentication for WebSocket connections:
- Check Authorization header or token query param
- Compare against GATEWAY_ADMIN_KEY environment variable
- Use createInternalAuthContext() for admin connections
- Fallback to guest auth for unauthenticated connections

This allows privileged operations for internal services with the
admin key while maintaining guest access for public endpoints.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
